title: SCP-939, With Many Voices
description: Don't trust any usual voices, it's definitely SCP-939...
body:
With Many Voices adds a terrifying new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-939, also known as With Many Voices or Doggo.


SCP-939 are large, red creatures that spawn underground. They are blind but are still able to detect nearby players. These creatures can imitate voices from the SCP Containment Breach game. They will scream when they find victims. Be cautious, as SCP-939 is a deadly predator with the ability to deceive and trap its prey using voices you might think you recognize.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-939 spawn?

SCP-939 can spawn underground in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be a few Instances of SCP-939

► Does SCP-939 copy Voices from Voice Mods?

No. SCP-939 does not copy with other voice mods. SCP-939 only makes the sounds from the game SCP Containment Breach.

</details>



![SCP-939](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/714f873b760922a2f4c921ffb4d6b6269e141e38.png)

SCP-939 is a red, quadrupedal creature that is blind and inhabits caves. It emits sounds from the game SCP Containment Breach and becomes aggressive if players gets close up to 5 blocks, or is not sneaking or walking on wool within 15 blocks. When provoked, SCP-939 begins to scream, and can release a cloud of amnestic gas, which inflicts the Amnesia effect on nearby players. This causes confusion. If SCP-939 attacks a player, the Amnesia effect is also given to players. 

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
